briefdescription.para: Maximum clock index (one past the last valid index).
Define a clock entry for a peripheral with numerical suffix.

detaileddescription.para: Used for peripherals with an index, for example SPI0, SPI1, UART0.

briefdescription.para: Define a clock entry for a single-instance peripheral.

detaileddescription.para: Used for peripherals that have only one instance, for example GDMA0, PSRAM, RTC.

briefdescription.para: Define a clock entry with a remapped peripheral name.

detaileddescription.para: Used when a clock index is mapped to another peripheral name.

memberdef.name: AMEBA_LTIM_PERIPHS
memberdef.initializer: AMEBA_REMAP_PERIPH(AMEBA_LTIM0_CLK, GTIMER) \ AMEBA_REMAP_PERIPH(AMEBA_LTIM1_CLK, GTIMER) \ AMEBA_REMAP_PERIPH(AMEBA_LTIM2_CLK, GTIMER) \ AMEBA_REMAP_PERIPH(AMEBA_LTIM3_CLK, GTIMER)

briefdescription.para: LTIM clock mappings to GTIMER peripheral.
PWM clock mapping to GTIMER peripheral.

detaileddescription.para: Used as a placeholder for an invalid or unused APB clock.

memberdef.name: AMEBA_CORE_PERIPHS
memberdef.initializer: AMEBA_RTC_PERIPHS \ AMEBA_PWM_PERIPHS \ AMEBA_UART_PERIPHS \ AMEBA_LOGUART_PERIPHS \ AMEBA_ADC_PERIPHS \ AMEBA_GPIO_PERIPHS \ AMEBA_LTIM_PERIPHS \ AMEBA_GDMA0_PERIPHS \ AMEBA_SPI_PERIPHS \ AMEBA_FLASH_PERIPHS \ AMEBA_I2C_PERIPHS \ AMEBA_PRNG_PERIPHS

detaileddescription.para: This macro expands to mappings of all core peripherals used by the clock control implementation.
